name: Tootsie Rolls
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup powdered milk, sifted until no lumps remain
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and begin adding the remaining ingredients.
2. Stir continuously until all components are well combined.
3. Knead the mixture until it forms a smooth dough.
4. Roll out the dough into thin sheets, then cut as needed.
